tools.name: get_ticket
tools.description: Pull the full ticket record including subject, body, submitter email, and timestamps. Call this first to understand the issue.

tools.name: lookup_customer_by_email
tools.description: Find the customer account from an email address. Use the submitter email from the ticket to get the customer_id you need for all other tools.

email.description: Email address of the ticket submitter

tools.name: read_error_logs
tools.description: Fetch error logs for a customer, filterable by endpoint and HTTP status code. Returns the last 24 hours by default — use since_hours to look further back.

endpoint.description: Optional: filter to a specific API endpoint, e.g. '/api/v2/users/sync'

status_code.description: Optional: filter by HTTP status code, e.g. 500, 401, 429

since_hours.description: How many hours back to search. Default: 24. Use 72 or more for issues that started days ago.

tools.name: check_webhook_deliveries
tools.description: View the webhook delivery log for a customer: delivery status, retry count, last successful and failed timestamps, and dropped event count.

status.description: Filter by delivery status. Use 'dropped' to see events we gave up on after retries.

since_hours.description: How many hours back to search. Default: 24.

tools.name: test_api_key
tools.description: Validate that an API key is active and check its permission scopes. Pass the key prefix (first 12 characters before the underscore-separated suffix), not the full key — e.g. for 'sk_live_abc123xyz', pass 'sk_live_abc1'.

key_prefix.description: First 12 characters of the API key, e.g. 'sk_live_abc1'. Do not pass the full key.

tools.name: inspect_integration_config
tools.description: Read the customer's detected integration configuration from recent traffic headers: SDK version, configured endpoints, retry settings, and timeout values.

tools.name: get_rate_limit_status
tools.description: Check the customer's current API usage against their rate limit, broken down by endpoint for the last hour. Use when the ticket mentions 429 errors or throttling.

endpoint.description: Optional: check rate limit for a specific endpoint only
